title: The Gate Where Nothing Leaves

features.name: intake-checkpoint
features.desc-on-touch: Every vehicle that enters passes through this moment of scrutiny. Cameras that remember every license plate, every expression. The gate learns arrival patterns.

features.name: departing-lane-myth
features.desc-on-touch: An exit lane that has never functioned. The barrier arm frozen mid-rise. Traffic records show zero vehicles leaving by this route since installation.

features.name: accumulation-counter
features.desc-on-touch: A mechanical counter that never resets. It knows how many vehicles have entered, but the departure column remains zero. The archive noticed first.

features.name: gate-mechanism-chamber
features.desc-on-touch: The hydraulic system that opens and closes the barrier. It remembers the logic: open for entry, closed to all else. Perfectly calibrated to its singular purpose.

features.name: surveillance-archive
features.desc-on-touch: Footage loops of the same moment: vehicles arriving, nothing departing. The tape feeds the gate its own sense of perpetual arrival, never conclusion.

features.name: manifest-stasis
features.desc-on-touch: The terminal is full. Not with vehicles, but with potential: every entry creates a space that departure could theoretically fill, but doesn't.

inscription: arrival redesigns itself as arrival's only outcome; the gate dreams of functioning perfectly

file.name: Terminal_Departure_Ledger_Blank_Pages_Since_Inception.csv
file.note: Comprehensive log of all vehicles entering, with an adjacent column for departures that remains unpopulated. The archive wondered if being filed meant you stayed.

exits.label: back to the parking circuit where journeys still dream of completion
east to the maintenance area where gate mechanisms are serviced
west to the arrival processing center where entry is institutionalized
